questions.question_text: CO Mapping A How is learning rate used in Gradient Boosting, and what is its effect on model convergence? B How is risk minimization used to derive the optimal decision rule in statistical decision theory? C How does entropy differ from Gini impurity as a splitting criterion in decision trees? D What is the impact of increasing model complexity on bias and variance? E Define bootstrapping and explain its role in estimating the sampling distribution of a statistic. F How do precision and recall differ, and how are they calculated? G Describe the ROC curve and the concept of Area Under the Curve . How can ROC analysis help in comparing the performance of classification models? H Highlight one key similarity and one key difference between LDA and logistic regression. CO Mapping

Compare and contrast Principal Component Regression and Partial Least Squares in terms of dimensionality reduction and predictive accuracy. Provide examples of scenarios where each method is preferred.
Discuss the differences between linear regression and multivariate regression. Provide examples to illustrate when each is appropriately used. CO Mapping
How does Principal Component Regression select components, and how does this impact model interpretation?
Describe the architecture and training process of a feedforward neural network. Discuss how training and validation are used to avoid overfitting. CO Mapping
Explain how ensemble methods help to improve the bias- variance tradeoff. Provide examples of scenarios where ensemble methods outperform individual models.
Discuss the working principle of Support Vector Machines in detail. How SVM handles linear and non-linear classification problems? CO Mapping
Describe the perceptron learning algorithm and its application in training single-layer neural networks.
Define BIRCH and CURE algorithms and compare these algorithms in terms of their clustering approaches and scalability.
